scripts.dev:admin-gateway: cross-env ADMIN_GATEWAY_PORT=5000 UPSTREAM_API_PORT=5001 UPSTREAM_API_HOST=127.0.0.1 node server/src/adminApiGateway.js
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names API,GATEWAY,ADMIN,DASHBOARD,WEBSITE "npm run dev:server:upstream" "npm run dev:admin-gateway" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:dashboard" "npm run dev:website"
scripts.dev:server:upstream: cross-env PORT=5001 npm run dev --workspace server
